card.name: Seeker of Whims
card.text: Flying {2}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Daydream. You gain 3 life. Activate only as a sorcery. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Cheerful Merchant
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Firelight Warden
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a Nightmare, destroy it.

card.name: Dozing Mount
card.text: Whenever you choose one or more modes, you gain 1 life and scry 1.

card.name: Festival Wanderers
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap two untapped creatures or artifacts you control or pay {2}. Vigilance

card.name: Harness Sunlight
card.text: Escalate {1} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put a vigilance counter on target creature. • Harness Sunlight deals 2 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Territorial Verdict
card.text: Escalate {2}{W} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. • Create a 2/2 white Griffin creature token with flying.

card.name: Stand Stalwart
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+2 until end of turn. If you've cast another spell this turn, untap those creatures.

card.name: Veiled Watcher
card.text: Vigilance As long as a graveyard has eight or more cards in it, this creature gets +2/+1.

card.name: Thought Hopper
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, scry 1, then target player mills a card.

card.name: Wisher of Wings
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Dreamscape Stag
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, put up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard on top of your library. Evoke {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Flight of Skywhales
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each kind of counter among permanents you control. Flying

card.name: Drift Off
card.text: Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it. Daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Mind Whirl
card.text: Scry 2, then draw two cards. Target player mills two cards.

card.name: Dreamscape's Boon
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Put a ward {2} counter on it. (Whenever that permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Harness Winds
card.text: Escalate {1} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put a flying counter on target creature. • Tap or untap target creature.

card.name: Tormented Bookkeeper
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Hopestalker
card.text: As long as it's your turn, prevent all damage that would be dealt to this creature by Dreams.

card.name: Void Hunters
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, target player sacrifices a creature. Evoke {1}{B} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Ravenous Pigbat
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, choose one — • Each player mills two cards. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Lakeside Revenant
card.text: When this creature enters, another target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains menace and indestructible until end of turn. Evoke {B} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Psyche Syphoner
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, target player mills three cards. Each opponent loses life equal to the number of nonland cards milled this way.

card.name: Foolish Mistake
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if a creature died this turn. Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Showboat
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Shadow of the Valley
card.text: Create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Harness Shadow
card.text: Escalate {1} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put a lifelink counter on target creature. • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Sunwisp Knight
card.text: Whenever you choose one or more modes, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Lightning Bottler
card.text: {2}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact or land: Scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Extravagant Seer
card.text: Whenever you scry, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains menace until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Mindblast Mage
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • This creature deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Eclipse Apparition
card.text: Reach Whenever a Nightmare you control leaves the battlefield, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Infernal Trumpeter
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. Evoke {1}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Spark of Inspiration
card.text: Spark of Inspiration deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Scry 1.

card.name: Creative Partnership
card.text: Daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Surge of Confidence
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Scry 1.

card.name: Head in the Clouds
card.text: Up to two target creatures can't block this turn. Daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Harness Flame
card.text: Escalate {1} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put a menace counter on target creature. • Harness Flame deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Grandgrowth Keeper
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • You gain 3 life. • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Playful Lotus-Eater
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever you choose one or more modes, untap this creature.

card.name: Ruthless Sureshot
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, if a creature died this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Bloom Terror
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, you may exile it. If you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Evoke {1}{G} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Branchback Bear
card.text: {3}{G}: Choose one — • This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. • Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Peripheral Hulk
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. {1}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Fantastical Ferocity
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn if it has a counter on it. Then, it fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Harness Nature
card.text: Escalate {1} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • Untap target permanent.

card.name: Artificial Dreamer
card.text: {3}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Daydream. Activate only as a sorcery. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Epiphany
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Evoke {2} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Expert Dreamcatcher
card.text: Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Exile target creature. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step" in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Sunstone Guardian
card.text: Flying When this creature enters or becomes the target of a spell or ability, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Symmetry Cultivator
card.text: When this creature enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Whenever, this creature attacks, up to one target creature you control has base power and toughness 3/3 until end of turn.

card.name: Visual Learner
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, scry 1. Whenever you put one or more cards on the bottom of your library, choose target creature an opponent controls. If it's tapped, put a stun counter on it. Otherwise, tap it.

card.name: Lucid Dreams
card.text: Draw X cards, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Opulent Blademaster
card.text: {1}{B}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only once each turn and only if a creature died this turn.

card.name: Ornithophobia
card.text: Flying When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, other creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. Evoke {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Memory Sifter
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, you may search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Evoke {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Forget
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a creature card from your graveyard. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Fears Realized
card.text: Choose one — • Remove up to three counters from target permanent. • Target player discards a card.

card.name: Molten Dreamhunter
card.text: Trample When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Evoke {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Ingenious Guide
card.text: Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target creature can't block this turn" in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Astraphobia
card.text: Escalate {1}{R} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Until end of turn, if a red source you control would deal damage, it deals that much damage plus 2. • Astraphobia deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Reckless Challenge
card.text: Each player exiles the top card of their library. Reckless Challenge deals damage to each player equal to the mana value of the card they exiled this way. Until the end of your next turn, you may play cards exiled this way, and mana of any type can be spent to cast them.

card.name: Druid's Hand
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, target land you control becomes a 5/5 green Elemental creature. It's still a land. Evoke {3}{G} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Might Realizer
card.text: Vigilance Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target creature you control gets +3/+3 until end of turn." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Lotus-Eye Tiger
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, choose one — • Put a trample counter on target creature. • Put a reach counter on target creature. • Put a vigilance counter on target creature. Untap it.

card.name: Distract
card.text: Target creature you control must be blocked this turn if able. When that creature becomes blocked this turn, you may return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Weave Your Legacy
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. • Up to two target creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. ​ ​

card.name: Descend into Madness
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each other spell you've cast this turn. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Live Life on a Whim
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Discard two cards, then draw two cards. • This enchantment deals 2 damage to any target. • You may put a creature card with mana value 4 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. ​ ​

card.name: Cloak in Wishes
card.text: Escalate {1}{G} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. • Target creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. • Whenever target creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw two cards.

card.name: Crystalline Guard
card.text: When you put this card on the bottom of your library, or this card is put into your graveyard from your library, you may reveal it. If you do, you may cast it. When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Uncertainty
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent looks at the top four cards of your library and separates them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard. Evoke {4} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Duskwrought Obelisk
card.text: {1}, {T}: Put a torment counter on target creature. Whenever a creature with a torment counter on it dies, draw a card.

card.name: Destiny Chaser
card.text: {1}{W}: Choose one. Activate only once — • Put a vigilance counter on this creature. It becomes a Human Soldier with base power and toughness 3/3. • Put a lifelink counter on this creature. It becomes a Human Cleric with base power and toughness 2/4. {2}{W}: If this creature is a Soldier or Knight, put a +1/+1 counter on it. It becomes an Incarnation Knight. {2}{W}: If this creature is a Cleric or Mystic, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn. It becomes an Incarnation Mystic.

card.name: Serenity
card.text: When this creature or another creature you control enters, target creature can't attack or block until your next turn. You may cast this card from your graveyard by tapping an untapped white creature you control rather than paying its mana cost. If you do, it's exiled when it enters the battlefield.

card.name: Illusions of Choice
card.text: When this creature enters, choose first or second. Players may only choose the chosen mode for modal spells and abilities if able.

card.name: Discovery
card.text: When this creature enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, scry 1, then you may reveal the top card of your library. If you do, spells you cast this turn that share a card type with the revealed card cost {1} less to cast. You may cast this card from your graveyard by tapping an untapped blue creature you control rather than paying its mana cost. If you do, it's exiled when it enters the battlefield.

card.name: Perished Thoughts
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it for each permanent card in a graveyard that was put there from anywhere this turn. Flying

card.name: Desire
card.text: When this creature enters, exile target creature card from an opponent's graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast that card, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast it. You may cast this card from your graveyard by tapping an untapped black creature you control rather than paying its mana cost. If you do, it's exiled when it enters the battlefield.

card.name: Baroness of Broken Dreams
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, choose one — • Exile that spell as it resolves. • Exile up to one target card from an opponent's graveyard. {3}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Until end of turn, you may cast cards exiled with this creature by paying life equal to their mana value rather than paying their mana cost.

card.name: Festival Lights
card.text: When this enchantment enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Whenever you choose one or more modes, put a +1/+1 counter on this enchantment, then it becomes a 0/0 Dream Fish creature with haste and trample in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Faceless Forging
card.text: Exile target creature, then choose one — • Its controller exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a creature card, then puts that card onto the battlefield. • Its controller exiles the top card of their library. They may cast that card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Intrusive Thought
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature deals damage equal to its power to its controller. Whenever you are dealt damage for the first time each turn, exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card until your next end step. Evoke {1}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Recklessness
card.text: Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, this creature deals 1 damage to any target. If this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn, create a Treasure token. You may cast this card from your graveyard by tapping an untapped red creature you control rather than paying its mana cost. If you do, it's exiled when it enters the battlefield.

card.name: Everflare Imagi
card.text: Whenever this creature deals damage, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Everflare Imagi deals 2 damage to any target." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Patience
card.text: When this creature enters or attacks, choose another target creature you control. Put two +1/+1 counters on it at the beginning of your next upkeep. You may cast this card from your graveyard by tapping an untapped green creature you control rather than paying its mana cost. If you do, it's exiled when it enters the battlefield.

card.name: Show the Ropes
card.text: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. Then choose one — • Show the Ropes deals damage equal to that card's power to target creature. • Draw two cards.

card.name: Cloudsea Traveler
card.text: When this creature enters, put a flying counter on each of up to X target creatures you control. Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Haunted Traveler
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control no Fish, create a 1/1 blue Fish Nightmare creature token. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Siban, Wish-Crowned
card.text: Trample When Siban dies, choose one — • Return it to the battlefield with two +1/+1 counters and a finality counter on it. • Exile it, then reveal the top three cards of your library. Put up to two permanent or modal cards revealed this way into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Dreamcatcher Squad
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a Dream or Nightmare creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{U}, {T}: Exile target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Kadha, Fear Glutton
card.text: Whenever Kadha enters or attacks, each opponent mills a card. If a nonland card was milled this way, you get an experience counter. Kadha gets +1/+1 for each experience counter you have. {1}{B}, Exile three other cards from your graveyard: Return Kadha from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Jubilant Sprinter
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, scry 1, then you may reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, put it onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. At the beginning of your next end step, put that creature on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Wildsight Imagi
card.text: Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token." in addition to their other modes. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't put the card onto the battlefield this way, put it into your hand.

card.name: Masterpiece Hellkite
card.text: Flying {2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, scry X, where X is the damage dealt.

card.name: Mavi, Living Memory
card.text: Flash Flying If a Dream you control entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Kyrie, Fear's Right Hand
card.text: Kyrie can't be blocked by creatures with power less than the number of creature cards in their controller's graveyard. Whenever Kyrie attacks and isn't blocked, create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of creature cards in defending player's graveyard.

card.name: Ana, Lantern Augur
card.text: Flying If you would scry a number of cards, scry that many cards plus one instead. At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal the top and bottom cards of your library. If they have equal mana value, put both into your hand. Otherwise, Ana deals damage equal to the difference to any target.

card.name: Estol, Ousted Nightlord
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more other creatures you control die, exile up to one of them. Whenever Estol deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card exiled with it onto the battlefield with a menace counter and a finality counter on it. That creature becomes a Nightmare in addition to its other types.

card.name: Worldsoul Bond
card.text: When this enchantment enters, daydream three times. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token. Then repeat this process twice.) The first spell you cast each turn costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.

card.name: Crowded Mind
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if it isn't an extra turn, take an extra turn after this one. Otherwise, reveal the top card of your library. Play that card without paying its mana cost if able. You can't cast other spells, play other lands, or activate abilities this turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if it's an extra turn, choose a creature you control at random. That creature can't be blocked this turn and must attack this turn if able. Other creatures you control can't attack this turn.

card.name: Infinity Blossoming
card.text: Whenever you choose a mode for a spell, you may exile that spell as it resolves and note the mode you chose. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may choose one from among modes noted for this enchantment and resolve that mode.

card.name: Memory of Heroism
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile target creature with power 4 or greater. I — Create two 1/1 colorless Dream creature tokens. Exile this Saga. You get an emblem with "Whenever one or more creatures you control with power 2 or less attack, draw a card." You get an emblem with "Whenever one or more creatures you control with power 2 or less attack, draw a card."

card.name: Memory of Tranquility
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Scry 2, then draw two cards. II — Target creature's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. III — Exile this Saga. You get an emblem with "Whenever you draw or mill one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature."

card.name: Memory of Power
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, destroy target creature. II — Target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn, where X is the number of permanent cards in your graveyard. III — Exile this Saga. You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 2 life and draw a card."

card.name: Memory of Rage
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. II — Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. III — Exile this Saga. You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, this emblem deals 1 damage to any target."

card.name: Memory of Flourishing
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. II — The next creature spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast. That creature enters with two additional +1/+1 counters on it. III — Exile this Saga. You get an emblem with "Creatures you control have trample."

card.name: Dreamsun's Attendants
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Dream you control enters, tap target creature.

card.name: Dive Into Dream
card.text: Exile target creature. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Fieldbound Explorer
card.text: When this creature enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Sunglyph Eagle
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, choose one — • Tap target creature. • You gain 2 life.

card.name: Wishborn Amalgam
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another Dream you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Contemplative Ascetic
card.text: Defender As long as you've chosen one or more modes this turn, this creature can attack as though it doesn't have defender.

card.name: Destabilize
card.text: Counter target creature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Discover the Possibilities
card.text: Daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Draw a card.

card.name: Entrancing Vision
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. When this Aura enters, choose one — • Tap enchanted creature. • Draw a card.

card.name: Melancholy Melodicist
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, any number of target players each mill two cards.

card.name: Sapphire Imagi
card.text: Whenever you scry, until end of turn, this creature gets +1/+1 and can't be blocked.

card.name: Stifle Creativity
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets a modal card. (A modal card has a modal effect anywhere in its text box.) Counter target spell.

card.name: Torrent Shaper
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Maze of Thought
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. Put a vigilance counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Whimsical Drake
card.text: Whenever another Dream you control enters, this creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Ashiok's Devoted
card.text: When this card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Nightmare Winds
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. • Exile target card from a graveyard. Its owner loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Extract the Truth
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent reveals their hand. You may choose a creature, enchantment, or planeswalker card from it. That player discards that card. • Target opponent sacrifices an enchantment.

card.name: Farwoods Marauder
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter and a menace counter on it if a creature died this turn.

card.name: Resilient Ambition
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0. When enchanted creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Revoke Reality
card.text: This spell costs {2} more to cast if it targets a creature with mana value 4 or greater. Exile target creature.

card.name: Wounded Pride
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2 {B}: Destroy enchanted creature. Activate this ability only if its controller has eight or more cards in their graveyard.

card.name: Valley Tormentor
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's attacking. When this creature dies, you may put a card from your hand on the bottom of your library. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Brilliant Bravado
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and has "Whenever this creature attacks, target creature can't block it this turn."

card.name: Campfire Elemental
card.text: Haste {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Choose one — • Target creature gains haste until end of turn. • Add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Daring Dreamblade
card.text: {2}{R}: Choose one. Activate only once each turn. • This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. • This creature deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Release Burdens
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw three cards, then put a card from your hand on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Storm Strider
card.text: When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may cast that card. Evoke {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Rule by Fear
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste and trample until end of turn. If there is a Nightmare card in your graveyard, that creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Crushing Canopy
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Emerald Dryad
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Put a reach counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Enhance Abilities
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn. • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Put a trample counter on it.

card.name: Enlist the Ecology
card.text: Escalate {2} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Put two +1/+1 counters on target permanent. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target land you control. It becomes a 0/0 green Elemental creature. It's still a land.

card.name: Greenhouse Mosshorn
card.text: Whenever you choose one or more modes, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Growth Mindset
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, and shuffle your library. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Strength of Memory
card.text: Enchant creature At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Conjurer's Steed
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, up to one other target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Evoke {G} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Sunstone Harvester
card.text: This creature enters with a hexproof counter on it.

card.name: Tara's Sentry
card.text: Defender This creature enters with a vigilance counter and a trample counter on it. When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Table of Trinkets
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — • This artifact deals 2 damage to target player. • Scry 1, then draw a card. • Target creature can't attack or block this turn.

card.name: Sunstone Pedestal
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Look at target opponent's hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Arcane Compass
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, scry 1, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Commune with Opportunity
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a land or modal card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. (A modal card has a modal effect anywhere in its text box.)

card.name: Decorated Dreamblade
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's your turn. {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Cloudstrider Herd
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn. Evoke {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Trappings of the Mind
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {2}: Enchanted creature loses all abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Creativity's Touch
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. • Target creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Beckoned Behemoth
card.text: This creature costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control with a counter on it. When this creature enters, put a trample counter and a ward {2} counter on target creature.

card.name: Watcher in the Woods
card.text: When this creature enters, you may have each player sacrifice a creature. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Forefront Thought
card.text: When this creature enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Whenever another Dream you control enters, you may draw a card. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Furious Wildshaper
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add {R}{G}. Spend this mana only to play a modal card or activate a modal ability. (A modal card has a modal effect anywhere in its text box.)

card.name: Sightless Stalker
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player mills a card. This creature's power is equal to the greatest number of cards in a graveyard.

card.name: Hellfire Enforcer
card.text: Whenever a Nightmare you control leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. {1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice a creature: This creature gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Blademaster Imagi
card.text: Haste Whenever you choose one or more modes, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Soulful Artist
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one. If you've chosen one or more modes this turn, choose one or more instead. • Put two +1/+1 counters and a trample counter on target creature you control. • Return target modal card from your graveyard to your hand. (A modal card has a modal effect anywhere in its text box.)

card.name: Thunderclaw Apex
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 1. Whenever you put one or more cards on the bottom of your library, this creature deals that much damage to any target.

card.name: Dynamic Duo
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • This creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Rampaging Featherbear
card.text: {1}{G}: This creature fights another target creature. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Farwoods Alpha
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, target creature you control gets +X/+X and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of different kinds of counters among permanents you control.

card.name: Leap From the Page
card.text: When this enchantment enters, scry 2. After you scry, you may exile the bottom card of your library. {1}{U}: This enchantment becomes a copy of a permanent card exiled with it until end of turn.

card.name: Complimentary Opposites
card.text: You may cast modal spells as though they had escalate {1}{W}. If you do, you may choose any number of modes rather than the indicated number for that spell. (Pay {1}{W} for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Whenever a spell or ability causes you to choose from a list of modes, if you chose all the available modes, draw a card.

card.name: Valorous Stance
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. • Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater.

card.name: Onslaught of Whimsy
card.text: Escalate {2}{W} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Create two 1/1 colorless Dream creature tokens. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Dreamcatcher's Confidence
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters or leaves the battlefield, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Ashiok, Fear Made Manifest
card.text: [+1]: Target player mills three cards. Each opponent loses life equal to the number of creature cards milled this way. [-2]: Create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of creature cards in all graveyards. [-6]: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you may return a creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield."

card.name: Tara Fellise
card.text: [+1]: Scry 1, then put the bottom card of your library into your hand. [-2]: Reveal the top card of your library. Tara deals damage equal to twice that card's mana value to target creature. Draw a card. [-8]: Exile the top 10 cards of your library. Until end of turn, you may cast those cards without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Aki, Wayward Son
card.text: Whenever you choose one or more modes, put that many loyalty counters on Aki. [0]: Daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) [-2]: Exile another target nonland permanent. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. [-3]: Until end of turn, target creature gets +X/+X and gains flying, trample, and haste, where X is the number of loyalty counters on Aki.

card.name: Active Imagination
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control or target creature card in your graveyard.

card.name: Shoot for the Stars
card.text: Choose one — • Shoot for the Stars deals 6 damage to target creature. • Shoot for the Stars deals 3 damage to target player. Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Beyondscape
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Farseer Fox
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, scry 1.

card.name: Entrancing Aspirant
card.text: When you cast your second spell each turn, if this creature doesn't have a lifelink counter on it, put a lifelink counter on it. Otherwise, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Vas, Renegade Nightmare
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, choose up to that many — • Create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token. • Discard a card. If you do, draw a card. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature.

card.name: Merciless Resolve
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or land. Draw two cards.

card.name: Beachside Companions
card.text: {2}{W}, {T}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a Dream card or a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them, reveal it, and put it into your hand.

card.name: Imaginative Rascals
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Fall From Grace
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 white Coward creature token with "This creature can't attack."

card.name: Hopeborn
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature or another Dream you control enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Tangleneck Stork
card.text: Double strike This creature gets +1/+1 for each spell you've cast this turn past the first.

card.name: Valor
card.text: First strike As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Plains, creatures you control have first strike.

card.name: Clouded Leopard
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, mill three cards. You may put a noncreature card from among the milled cards into your hand. If you don't, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Dreamscape Guardian
card.text: Vigilance Other Dreams you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Diversion Adept
card.text: Flying Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn" in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Going Swimmingly
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, daydream." (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: Isolation
card.text: Ward {2} As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control an Island, creatures you control have ward {2}.

card.name: Rastian's Teachings
card.text: Choose target creature. For each kind of counter among other creatures you control, put a counter of that kind on that creature. That creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Supreme Will
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. • Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Wisp of Memory
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and a ward {2} counter on target creature.

card.name: Ashiok's Ascension
card.text: Mill three cards, then choose one — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Emotionless Dreamblade
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, you may have this creature get +2/+0 and gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Griefborn
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature enters or another Nightmare you control leaves the battlefield, choose one — • Any number of target players lose 1 life. • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Hardship
card.text: Menace As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Swamp, creatures you control have menace.

card.name: Mortality Connoisseur
card.text: Lifelink Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life" in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Superiority Complex
card.text: Enchanted creature has "Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." {B}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Enchanted creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Anger
card.text: Haste As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Mountain, creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Brilliant Analyst
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you choose one or more modes, you may exile the top card of your library. If you do, you may play that card this turn. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Mindscorcher
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals X damage to target creature, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast it. Evoke {X}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Nightmarish Intimidator
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever this creature attacks, target creature with power less than or equal to its power can't block this turn.

card.name: Overwhelming Odds
card.text: Escalate {1}{R} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 for each creature blocking it and gains trample until end of turn. • Creatures you control gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Squeaking Tyrant
card.text: Flying {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Sundering Ritual
Aegis of Resolve
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature. If enchanted creature would be dealt damage while it has a counter on it, instead prevent that damage and remove a counter from it.

card.name: Brawn
card.text: Trample As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Forest, creatures you control have trample.

card.name: Farwoods Champion
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Greenhouse's Encouragement
card.text: Choose two. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. • Create a 1/2 green Elemental creature token with vigilance.

card.name: Kindly Caretaker
card.text: Whenever you choose one or more modes, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Sunstone Wielder
card.text: When this creature enters, put a hexproof counter on target creature you control. When this creature leaves the battlefield, remove a hexproof counter from a creature you control.

card.name: Crack the Sun
card.text: Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a modal card. Until end of turn, you may play it. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Until end of turn, rather than choose the indicated number of modes for modal spells and abilities you control, you may choose any number of modes instead. If you do, you can't choose the same mode more than once.

card.name: Quill of Whims
Let Imagination Soar
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Put a flying counter on target creature. • Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. ​ ​

card.name: Take Fear's Oath
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Each player sacrifices a creature. • Mill four cards. • Create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard. ​ ​

card.name: Chase Your Dreams
card.text: When this enchantment enters, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may reveal the top card of your library. If you do, target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is that card's mana value.

card.name: Find Wonder Everywhere
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • You may play an additional land this turn. • Create a 1/2 green Elemental creature token with vigilance. • You may pay {X}. If you do, put X +1/+1 counters on target creature. ​ ​

card.name: Leaping Imagi
card.text: Flying Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn" in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Wrack the Brain
card.text: Enchant player At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, that player mills two cards. Choose a nonland card milled this way. Enchanted player loses life equal to that card's mana value and returns it from their graveyard to their hand.

card.name: Desolate Crossroads
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} {1}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one — • Target opponent loses 2 life. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Fleeting Cloudscape
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {1}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one — • You gain 3 life. • You gain hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Sunset Vista
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {1}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • The next spell you cast this turn can't be countered.

card.name: Thawing Underpass
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} {1}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one — • Target player mills two cards. • Tap or untap target permanent.

card.name: Unstable Terrain
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {1}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one — • This land deals 1 damage to any target. • Discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Gilded Automaton
card.text: This creature enters with four +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Choose one. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn. • Create a Treasure token. • Put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control.

card.name: Sunstone Amulet
card.text: Equipped creature gets +0/+2 and has ward {2} and "{1}, {T}, Unattach Sunstone Amulet Exile target card from a graveyard." Equip {2}

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Aspect of the Recruiter
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with toughness 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Aspect of the Mage
card.text: Until end of turn, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. When you do, exile it as it resolves.

card.name: Aspect of the Wurm
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, that player loses 2 life. Creatures your opponents control get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Aspect of the Pyromancer
card.text: Discard two cards, then draw two cards. For each nonland card discarded this way, create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.

card.name: Aspect of the Behemoth
card.text: Creatures you control get +X/+X and gain trample until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Amara's Mastery
card.text: Escalate {W} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose any number. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. • You gain 3 life. • Create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.

card.name: Ophys' Mastery
card.text: Escalate {U} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose any number. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Draw a card. • Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. • Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Ilias's Mastery
card.text: Escalate {B} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose any number. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Return target creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. • Target player discards a card.

card.name: Maraye's Mastery
card.text: Escalate {R} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose any number. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Target creature can't block this turn. • Maraye's Mastery deals 1 damage to target creature and 1 damage to its controller. • Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Korvik's Mastery
card.text: Escalate {G} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose any number. You may choose the same mode more than once — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Untap it. • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. • Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Cloudbreather
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever this creature attacks, choose one — • This creature gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. • Other attacking creatures get +0/+1 until end of turn. Untap them.

card.name: Ori, Collective Aspiration
card.text: Ori's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control. Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Daydream." in addition to their other modes. You can't choose this mode while daydreaming. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token. )

card.name: Selective Memory
card.text: Each player chooses an artifact, creature, enchantment, and planeswalker they control, and up to two cards in their graveyard. Exile each nonland permanent and card in a graveyard not chosen this way.

card.name: Mental Breakdown
card.text: Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it. Its controller mills half their library, rounded up.

card.name: Subliminal Messaging
card.text: When this enchantment enters, secretly choose up to three creatures. Whenever a creature you chose attacks, you may reveal that you chose it if you haven't already. If you do, choose one — • Return that creature to its owner's hand. • Remove it from combat and put a stun counter on it. Its controller mills two cards.

card.name: Ashiok's Machinations
card.text: Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, put a terror counter on this enchantment. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice a nontoken creature. If you do, create an X/X black Nightmare creature token, where X is the number of terror counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Farwoods Scrounger
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, if it had counters on it, you may put those counters on this creature. Remove a counter that's not a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Sunstone Elemental
card.text: Trample Protection from instants, sorceries, enchantments, Bards, Clerics, Druids, Mystics, Shamans, Sorcerers, Spellshapers, Warlocks, and Wizards. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted or dealt damage by instants, sorceries, enchantments, Bards, Clerics, Druids, Mystics, Shamans, Sorcerers, Spellshapers, Warlocks, and Wizards.)

card.name: Wildest Dreams
card.text: Return X target cards from your graveyard to your hand. Exile this card.

card.name: Vision of Grandeur
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Dream you control enters, you may pay {U}. If you do, return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Aolis, Gilded Master
card.text: First strike Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a Treasure token. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, spells you cast this turn cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Ashen, Farwoods Warden
card.text: When Ashen enters, mill X cards. At the beginning of your end step, you may exile X cards from your graveyard, where X is the mana value of target creature card in a graveyard that was put there from anywhere this turn. If you do, put that card onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Rastian, Dreamblade Captain
card.text: When Rastian enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Whenever one or more counters are placed on a creature you control for the first time each turn, you may put the same number and kind of counters on another target creature you control.

card.name: Floria, Unswaying Optimist
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may play modal cards from the top of your library. (A modal card has a modal effect anywhere in its text box.) Whenever you choose one or more modes, you gain that much life.

card.name: Quoro, the Worldwish
card.text: Flying, trample At the beginning of your end step, distribute X +1/+1 counters among any number of target creatures you control, where X is the number of modes you chose this turn.

card.name: Conscripted Concience
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast for each mode you've chosen this turn. When this creature dies, daydream. (Choose one — Scry 2; or create a 1/1 colorless Dream creature token.)

card.name: The Possibility Capsule
card.text: {3}, {T}: Copy target modal spell or ability you control. You must choose new modes for the copy, and can't choose any modes you chose for the original spell or ability.

card.name: Amara, Lucid of Order
card.text: Ward—Amara's controller creates two 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens with lifelink. Flying Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Exile target creature until Amara leaves the battlefield." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Ophys, Lucid of Understanding
card.text: Ward—Ophys's controller draws two cards. Vigilance Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Ilias, Lucid of Ambition
card.text: Ward—Ilias's controller may return a creature card from their graveyard to their hand. Deathtouch Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target player loses 3 life and you gain 3 life." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Maraye, Lucid of Passion
card.text: Ward—Maraye's controller deals 3 damage to a target of their choice. Haste Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Put your hand on the bottom of your library in a random order, then draw three cards." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Korvik, Lucid of Strength
card.text: Ward—Korvik's controller distributes three +1/+1 counters among up to three creatures they control. Trample Imagination — Modal spells and abilities you control have "Target creature you control other than Korvik deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Creativity
Valorbound Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Imagination — As long as this card is in your graveyard, modal spells and abilities you control have "Return Valorbound Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield." in addition to their other modes.

card.name: Distinctive Landmark
card.text: Indestructible This land enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.

card.name: Horizon Canopy
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W} or {G}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Dusklit Spire
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {B} or {R}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Seaview Cliffs
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W} or {U}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Rugged Valley
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {R} or {G}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Obsidian Falls
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {U} or {B}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Responsibility
card.text: When this creature enters, put an indestructible counter on target creature. That creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. Evoke {4} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Meet the Dawn
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 2. Then, you may exile the top and bottom card of your library, a card from your graveyard, a card from your hand, and a permanent you control. If five nonland cards with the same mana value were exiled this way, you win the game.

card.name: Blank Slate
card.text: Escalate {1}. You can't pay more than one mana of the same color this way. Create a 4/4 colorless Avatar creature token, then choose any number — • Put a flying counter and a vigilance counter on it. • It gains "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card." • Put a menace counter and a lifelink counter on it. • It gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. • Put a trample counter and a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Griffin LUS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Warrior LUS
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Elemental LUS
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Treasure LUS
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Coward LUS
card.text: This creature can't attack.

card.name: Copy LUS
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: Warren Warleader LUS
card.text: Whenever you attack, choose one — • Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token that's tapped and attacking. • Attacking creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. (This token's mana cost is {2}{W}{W}.)

card.name: Bird LUS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Wicked Role LUS
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. When this Aura is put into a graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Knight LUS
card.text: Vigilance
